title: Progress in immunization information systems--United States, 2011.
ehr_evidence: The text mentions interoperability with electronic health records as a functionality of IIS, but the data analyzed comes from the IIS Annual Report (IISAR) survey.
summary: A report on the progress of Immunization Information Systems (IIS) in the United States in 2011, evaluating child participation and the completeness of core data elements.
key_findings: 84% of U.S. children <6 years participated in an IIS in 2011.
59% of grantees included all 18 core data elements.
Average completeness of core data elements ranged from 38% to ≥98%.
study_design: Descriptive analysis of administrative survey data
population: Children <6 years in the United States
